SELECT COUNT(*) AS zero_count FROM (SELECT toUInt32OrZero(value) AS converted_value FROM test_values) WHERE converted_value = 0;
SELECT value, toUInt32OrZero(value) AS converted_value FROM test_values WHERE value NOT LIKE '%[^0-9]%' ORDER BY converted_value ASC;
WITH (SELECT toUInt32OrZero(value) AS converted_value FROM test_values) AS conversion_results SELECT AVG(converted_value) FROM conversion_results;
SELECT a.value AS original, b.converted_value FROM test_values AS a JOIN (SELECT value, toUInt32OrZero(value) AS converted_value FROM test_values) AS b ON a.value = b.value;
SELECT toUInt32OrZero(toString(x)) FROM (SELECT number AS x FROM system.numbers LIMIT 10);
WITH '5', '0c' AS mixed_values SELECT toUInt32OrZero(mixed_values) FROM (SELECT '5' AS value UNION ALL SELECT '0c') AS sub_query;
SELECT toUInt32OrZero('123') AS valid_num, toUInt32OrZero('abc') AS invalid_num, toUInt32OrZero('-50') AS negative_num, toUInt32OrZero('3.14') AS float_string;
CREATE TABLE complexity_test (id UInt32, input String);
SELECT input, toUInt32OrZero(input) FROM complexity_test WHERE id <= 3;
